# Stratus Event Center

> Premier event venue in Phoenix, Arizona (also known as Club Stratus). A modern, fully-staffed indoor venue specializing in corporate events, live music and concerts, serving Phoenix and the West Valley: Glendale, Peoria, Avondale, Surprise and Litchfield Park.

## Key facts
- Address: 4344 W Indian School Rd, Ste 32, Phoenix, AZ 85031 (just off Indian School Rd, minutes from the I-10 and Loop 101)
- Phone (call or text): (602) 908-7817
- Email: Stratuseventcenteraz@gmail.com
- Tours: by appointment, 7 days a week
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/stratuseventcenteraz/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/StratusEventCenter/

## What the venue offers
- Flexible main hall that scales from intimate seated dinners to large-scale concerts
- Built-in stage and dance floor
- In-house professional sound and programmable lighting
- Full-service catering and licensed bar; approved outside caterers welcome for cultural and specialty menus
- Professional on-site security at every event
- On-site lit parking

## Events and tickets
- Live event calendar (Club Stratus): https://www.bandsintown.com/v/10168441-club-stratus
- Official ticket sellers: Bandsintown, Ticketón, Tickeri, Ticketmaster (https://www.ticketmaster.com/stratus-event-center-boletos-phoenix/venue/205291)
- Verified resale: https://www.stubhub.com/stratus-event-center-tickets/venue/102133143/
- Typical programming: norteño, reggaetón, duranguense and other Latin concerts, plus private events

## Pages
- Home: https://cornishclaudebot-ux.github.io/stratus-event-center-site/
- Upcoming events: https://cornishclaudebot-ux.github.io/stratus-event-center-site/events.html
- Book a tour: https://cornishclaudebot-ux.github.io/stratus-event-center-site/book.html
